---
title: "Reads"
subtitle: "Pocket reads"
---

```{python}
#| echo: false
from _motherduck import connect

con = connect()


def query(sql: str):
    return con.sql(sql).df()
```

## Pending

```{python}
#| echo: false
from IPython.display import Markdown

pending = query("""
    select item_id, added_at, resolved_title, time_to_read, given_url
    from personal.items
    where read_at is null
    order by added_at desc
    limit 5
""")
total_pending = query(
    """\
    select count(*) as total from personal.items
    where read_at is null
    """
)["total"][0]

links = "\n".join(
    f"- [{row.resolved_title} ({row.time_to_read or '?'} min)]"
    f"(https://getpocket.com/read/{row.item_id}) "
    f"([source]({row.given_url}))"
    for row in pending.itertuples()
)
Markdown(
    f"""\
I have a total of **{total_pending}** pending reads in Pocket.

Recent additions:

{links}
"""
)
```

## Recent

```{python}
#| echo: false
recent = query("""
    select item_id, resolved_title, time_to_read, given_url
    from personal.items
    where read_at is not null
    order by read_at desc
    limit 5
""")

links = "\n".join(
    f"- [{row.resolved_title} ({row.time_to_read or '?'} min)]"
    f"(https://getpocket.com/read/{row.item_id}) "
    f"([source]({row.given_url}))"
    for row in recent.itertuples()
)
Markdown(f"Recently read:\n\n{links}")
```

## Tags

Most used tags:

```{python}
#| echo: false
query("""
    select tag, count(*) as total
    from personal.tags
    group by tag
    order by total desc
    limit 10
""")
```

## Authors

Top authors:

```{python}
#| echo: false
query("""
    select author_name, count(*) as total
    from personal.authors
    group by author_name
    order by total desc
    limit 5
""")
```
